calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-09-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonai Wong #11288.

Mark Smith present in pro per for plaintiff/Cross Defendant JMT Mechanical.
Mark Smith was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant/Cross-Plaintiff Vision Builders, Inc.

After hearing the testimony and considering the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and Cross-Defendant JMT Mechanical and against the Defendant/Cross-Plaintiff Vision Builders Inc. as follows:

Damages - $11836.00
Attorney's Fees - 16000.00
Prejudgment Interest - $493.42
Costs - $420.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $14,379.42
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
